_comment: Canonical gas figures published in the paper's analysis tables. Generated by scripts/run_and_verify.sh and compared against this file. Drift > tolerance_pct triggers a non-zero exit. Edit this file (and re-render the paper) if a contract change is intentional. ZK proofs are verified by the notary off-chain (paper Sec. V); only the notary attestation signature is verified on-chain.

offchain_projected._comment: Off-chain figures cited from external sources or projected; not measurable from this prototype (no real TLSNotary integration). Source labels reference references.bib entries.
